welcome.subject: Welcome to TopiVra!
welcome.body: Thank you for signing up for TopiVra. We're excited to have you in our community.
welcome.footer: If you have any questions, feel free to contact us.

emailVerification.subject: Verify Your Email Address
emailVerification.body: Please click the button below to verify your email address. This link will expire in 24 hours.
emailVerification.footer: If you didn't sign up for TopiVra, please ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset Your Password
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to reset it. This link will expire in 1 hour.
passwordReset.footer: If you didn't request a password reset, please ignore this email.

orderConfirmation.subject: Order Confirmation - {{orderNo}}
orderConfirmation.body: Your order has been confirmed. Order number: {{orderNo}}

orderDelivered.subject: Order Delivered - {{orderNo}}
orderDelivered.body: Your order has been delivered. Please log in to view the account information.
orderDelivered.footer: If you have any issues, please contact support.

sellerNewOrder.subject: New Order Notification - {{orderNo}}
sellerNewOrder.body: You have a new order. Please process it promptly.

withdrawalApproved.subject: Withdrawal Request Approved
withdrawalApproved.body: Your withdrawal request has been approved. Amount: {{amount}}. Expected to arrive in 3-5 business days.

withdrawalRejected.subject: Withdrawal Request Rejected
withdrawalRejected.body: Your withdrawal request has been rejected. Reason: {{reason}}
withdrawalRejected.footer: If you have any questions, please contact support.

refundApproved.subject: Refund Request Approved - {{refundNo}}
refundApproved.body: Your refund request has been approved. Amount: {{amount}}. Expected to arrive in 3-5 business days.

ticketReply.subject: Ticket Reply - {{ticketNo}}
ticketReply.body: There's a new reply to your ticket. Please log in to view it.
